scope: Global Islamic Knowledge Graph — Phase 0 Audit
methodology: Route and page inventory in src/
Pipeline review: AKE, auto-content, fiqh, lesson-sync

executive_summary.verdict: Foundation exists — not a Knowledge Graph yet
strengths: Multi-layer ingestion (AKE v13, auto-content, fiqh sync, lesson-sync)
AI metadata enrichment pipeline with quality gates
Hybrid search (FTS + trigram) across platform tables
Fiqh council has explicit relation edges (fiqh_council_relations)
CMS polymorphic index (cms_content_index) for cross-content search
No Lorem Ipsum in src; placeholder fiqh items filtered from public
critical_gaps: No unified entity model (scholar, book, hadith, ayah, topic as first-class nodes)
No global edge table spanning all content types
Three content silos: CMS tables, knowledge_items, auto_imported_content
Semantic search RPCs exist but are not wired to SearchPage
knowledge_items.related_ids, ai_persons, ai_books, ai_evidence columns never populated in app code
Quran ayah text not stored locally — fetched from external API
Hadith corpus on main is tiny (47); 40,684 hadith work exists on unmerged branch
Fawaid/QA far below target (hundreds vs tens of thousands)
Most AKE connectors inactive in production registry
executive_summary.recommended_next_phase: Design knowledge_entities + knowledge_edges schema, unify silos, merge content-architecture branch
